candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue recognized in the period.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label; equals Total Revenue in preview and may be used across periods.
Balancing row, not a reported revenue line.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue line changes over time; prefer Total Revenue, then Net sales.

candidates.why: Core direct input cost for manufacturing; strong COGS component.
Direct cost of purchased goods sold; strong COGS component.
Often part of cost of sales under nature-of-expense format, but sign conventions can vary.

variables.notes: REVIEWED.No COGS candidate list was provided, and the income statement is presented by nature rather than by function. Selected the most likely direct production/resale cost components from the full A-column preview. Manual review recommended because a functional cost-of-sales line is not explicitly reported and coverage of direct external production costs may be incomplete.

candidates.why: Classic operating overhead component and populated in preview.
Explicit SG&A component if reported separately.
Explicit SG&A component if reported separately.

variables.notes: Selected overhead components only. Excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, interest, and totals/subtotals.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line on the income statement; best semantic match.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense; excluded by rule.
Balance sheet asset, not expense.
Balance sheet capitalization, not expense.
Accumulated amortization balance sheet contra-asset, not expense.

variables.notes: Used the explicit income statement R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Best direct interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses related to usufruct assets
candidates.why: Interest on lease/usufruct liabilities; valid interest expense alternative.
Potential alternate leasing-interest label across periods.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental but semantically valid interest expense alternative.
Net finance line; acceptable fallback only if direct interest expense unavailable.
Balancing row, not reported expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses related to usufruct assets
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list of interest-expense labels, preferring direct expense lines and using the net interest line only as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred for BE when separate NCI exists.
Not equity; full balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match for MIB.
Possible minority interest-related line but less standard and unpopulated.
Alternative balance sheet NCI label across periods.

variables.notes: Priority list for balance sheet non-controlling interest labels only; excluded income statement attribution rows.
